name: Fingerman Bread Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay one bread loaf on a cutting board and cut the loaf lengthwise into halves using scissors.
2. Cut each half into 8 equal pieces using a sharp knife or scissors. Pierce each piece of dough 2 to 3 times with the tines of a fork to remove air bubbles.
3. Place melted butter in a shallow dish. Combine cheese and herb seasoning on a plate. Place minced onion on a separate plate.
4. Roll each piece of dough into 8-inch logs (the dough will shrink to 6 to 7-inch logs). Dip each piece of dough into the melted butter and roll in the desired topping.
5. Place the rolls on a cookie sheet and bake in a preheated 350-degree oven until browned, about 15 to 20 minutes. Serve warm with melted cheese sauce, salsa, or other dips.
